title: Require Oclif App Entrypoints
forbids: a production or development entrypoint that delegates through a second launcher or performs work outside direct Oclif execution
why: The executable and development paths are two direct projections of the same Oclif application. Production discovers compiled commands and development discovers TypeScript commands without another selector or bootstrap authority.
remediate: Keep bin/run.js as the direct production execute call and src/index.ts as the direct development execute call. Move application behavior behind Oclif commands and public service boundaries.
message: Oclif entrypoints must invoke the application directly without another launcher.
